HTML.Attr.Name.UseCDATA TYPE: bool DEFAULT: false VERSION: 4.0.0 --DESCRIPTION-- The W3C specification DTD defines the name attribute to be CDATA, not ID, due to limitations of DTD. In certain documents, this relaxed behavior is desired, whether it is to specify duplicate names, or to specify names that would be illegal IDs (for example, names that begin with a digit.) Set this configuration directive to true to use the relaxed parsing rules. --# vim: et sw=4 sts=4
